timeline.title: Senior SOC Analyst
timeline.description: Lead threat hunting operations and incident response for Fortune 500 clients. Implemented advanced SIEM correlation rules reducing false positives by 60%.

timeline.title: SOC Analyst II
timeline.description: Specialized in malware analysis and digital forensics. Developed custom Python scripts for threat intelligence automation.

timeline.title: Junior Security Analyst
timeline.description: Started career in cybersecurity with focus on network monitoring and vulnerability assessment.

timeline.title: M.S. Cybersecurity
timeline.description: Master's degree focusing on incident response, digital forensics, and threat intelligence. Thesis on AI-driven threat detection.

timeline.title: B.S. Computer Science
timeline.description: Bachelor's degree with concentration in cybersecurity. Graduated Summa Cum Laude.

timeline.title: NebulaHost Infrastructure
timeline.description: Built self-hosted infrastructure with Debian 12, Docker, Traefik, and comprehensive monitoring stack.

timeline.title: SANS FOR508 Training
timeline.description: Advanced Incident Response, Threat Hunting, and Digital Forensics course - Upcoming
